# UC-13.2.40 · Fluent Bit Kubernetes Filter Cache Miss Storm

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Performance, Availability &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We read the forwarder and buffer logs for stress and give-ups so we see log loss risk before disks or patience run out.*

---

## Description

API server throttling on metadata lookups delays every container log.

## Value

Signals need for `Kube_Tag_Prefix`, `use_kubelet`, or reduced refresh interval.

## Implementation

Scrub bearer tokens from logs; use HEC with TLS.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:log"
| search "kubernetes" AND ("cache" OR "api" OR "429" OR "throttl")
| stats count by host, kube_url_host
| where count>=100
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (cluster × error), Timeline.

## Known False Positives

Collector errors during config changes, target restarts, or transport and credential issues. We read collector logs and compare with the OTel pipeline view.

## References

- [Fluent Bit monitoring — storage](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/monitoring)
- [Fluentd monitoring](https://docs.fluentd.org/deployment/)
